mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 1
SELECT user_id, email, name, phone, profile_image FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(user_id, email, password, name, phone, profile_image) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{profileImage})
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone},
profile_image = #{profileImage}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, password FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE users SET is_active = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND name = #{name} AND phone = #{phone} AND is_active = 0
